8b4f1c2e-0d35-4f87-a1c3-2e9b6a3f7d12: "Light Amp Toggle | Miscellaneous" Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").
487d7f33-154c-44f8-92cc-631b1648042e: "Toggle Docking Camera | Camera" F4 + numpad-* keyboard chord -- bound for an unrebindable in-game action.
34cbdc14-347d-4671-9fe5-03fd7c25ec0c: "Modifier | Modifier" Temporary push to Modifier while held (already in Modifier; refreshes the hold).
507b0262-635a-433c-9544-21c2bd4964cf: "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.
e6909903-dee7-4069-ba56-f5e0cfb487ef: "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.
ee318112-b368-4165-83b1-40ed14358f24: "NAV Mode | Flight Control" Cycle into Nav mode.
e2930cd1-a204-480f-a76e-62d8f3c8ae77: "SCM Mode | Flight Control" Cycle re-affirms SCM mode (no-op). Paired vJoy mapping is the real action.
97376e21-fcaa-4151-b5bb-5e88695b244d: "Toggle M/S | Flight Control" Cycle into Auxiliary mode.
a1c55348-cf6b-491d-8f46-22520290d78d: "Master Mode Cycle | Flight Control" Cycle into Nav mode.
31827787-0c9c-47e9-bba5-15fab77aac74: "Master Mode Cycle | Flight Control" Cycle into SCM mode.
